channel.title: Artifact: Travel Log on Field Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Artifact: Travel Log on Field Notes

item.title: See_You_At_Sunrise
item.description:
Day 1: Inside out. Did major cutting on my shirt. Perfect! Planned a whole lineup schedule. Perfect! Forgot what we ate day one. Oh! I think it was peanut butter oats with apple crisp topping at Winnie and Ethels Diner.

Day 2: Squirtle squad! Blowing bubble attacks on people was fun! Another sunrise and another lineup schedule that was awesome. I know I had something but I don’t remember what. Oh! A donut, fruity pebbles. It was loaded with frosting and rolled in cereal. I had a vanilla coffee with almond milk I think. We hunted collectibles, visiting all the stages. The car ride home was looooong.

Day 3: Freezing wind! I survived. Made it to the car. Lumpia and bulgogi.

Image
